# discord_guild_widget (Resource)

Manages the widget settings of a Discord guild. The widget is a singleton on the guild; destroying this resource disables the widget.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_guild_widget" "main" {
  server_id  = "123456789012345678"
  enabled    = true
  channel_id = "456789012345678901" # invite channel shown on the widget
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Optional

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel the widget generates invites for.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the widget is enabled.
